items.title: Venezuela Live Updates: Rescuers Search for Quake Survivors as Leader Calls to ‘Militarize’ Area

items.title: Europe's deadly heatwave breaks German record and halts public events
items.summary: Germany's highest ever temperature of 41.3C is recorded provisionally in Saarbrücken, over the border from France.
